  • Some APN functions CCZ-equivalent to x^3 + tr n(x^9) and CCZ-inequivalent to the Gold functions over GF(2^n)

Some APN functions CCZ-equivalent to x^3 + tr n(x^9) and CCZ-inequivalent to the Gold functions over GF(2^n)¶

Content partially extracted from data/Some_APN_functions_CCZ-equivalent_to_x%5E3_%2B_tr_n(x%5E9)_and_CCZ-inequivalent_to_the_Gold_functions_over_GF(2%5En).txt. Original page:

https://boolean.wiki.uib.no/Some_APN_functions_CCZ-equivalent_to_x%5E3_%2B_tr_n(x%5E9)_and_CCZ-inequivalent_to_the_Gold_functions_over_GF(2%5En)

Cases regarding Proposition 3 of [1]¶

\(N^{\circ}\)

Functions

Conditions

\(d^{\circ}\)

\(1\)

\(x^3 + \mathrm{Tr}_n(x^9) + (x^2+x)\mathrm{Tr}_n(x^3+x^9)\)
\(n \geqslant 5\) odd, | \(\gcd(i,n)=1\)

\(3\)

\(2\)

\(x^3 + \mathrm{Tr}_n(x^9) + (x^2+x+1)\mathrm{Tr}_n(x^3)\)
\(n \geqslant 4\) even, | \(\gcd(i,n)=1\)

\(3\)

\(3\)
\(\Big(x + \mathrm{Tr}_n^3(x^6+x^{12}) + \mathrm{Tr}_n(x)\mathrm{Tr}_n^3(x^3+x^{12})\Big)^3 +\) | \(\mathrm{Tr}_n\Big(\left(x + \mathrm{Tr}_n^3(x^6+x^{12}) + \mathrm{Tr}_n(x)\mathrm{Tr}_n^3(x^3+x^{12})\right)^9\Big)\)
\(6|n,\) | \(\gcd(i,n)=1\)

\(4\)

\(4\)

\(\left(x^{\frac{1}{3}} + \mathrm{Tr}_n^3(x+x^4)\right)^{-1} + \mathrm{Tr}_n\left(\left(\left(x^{\frac{1}{3}} + \mathrm{Tr}_n^3(x+x^4)\right)^{-1}\right)^9\right)\)
\(3|n,\) | \(n\) odd

\(4\)

Previous topic

Some APN functions CCZ-equivalent to gold functions and EA-inequivalent to power functions over GF(2^n)
